attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WIGLQRT.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WIGLQRT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
 NHBP.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME  ,
 WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY                ,  
 WIGLQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   /*OA Q1FY15 Changes */
,WIGLQRT.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WIGLQRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
,WIGLQRT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
, WIGLQRT.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
, WIGLQRT.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIGLQRT
 INNER JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT NHBP
 ON (WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY=NHBP.HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY AND  NHBP.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 WHERE  WIGLQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT NOT IN(
 SELECT WIGLQRT1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIGLQRT1
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR FISYM
 ON(WIGLQRT1.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =FISYM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG='Y' )
 )
 AND WIGLQRT.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ='Y'
 AND WIGLQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' /*OA Q1FY15 Changes */

SELECT 
 WIGLQRT.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           ,
 WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WIGLQRT.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
 WIGLQRT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME    ,     
 NHBP.BK_HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_TYPE_NAME ,
 WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY                ,
 WIGLQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD    /*OA Q1FY15 Changes */ 
,WIGLQRT.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,WIGLQRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG  
,WIGLQRT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
, WIGLQRT.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
, WIGLQRT.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_CURR_LAST_QRTR  WIGLQRT
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR FISYM
 ON(WIGLQRT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =FISYM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG='Y' )
 INNER JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_HNDSHK_BUNDLE_PRODUCT NHBP
 ON (WIGLQRT.PRODUCT_KEY=NHBP.HANDSHAKE_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY AND  NHBP.BK_ALLOCATION_TYPE_CD='ACTUAL')
 WHERE WIGLQRT.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      ='Y'
 AND WIGLQRT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'STANDALONE' /*OA Q1FY15 Changes */
